text:
The Olympic Games are up and running! Team Ireland have a record 133 athletes going for gold!! They have done the hard work to get there and now we need all the boys and girls in Ireland to cheer them on.

Check out the cool promo starringJack Woolleywho will be competing inTaekwondo (58kg).

RTÉjr are supporting the green machine. On ourInstaandTikTokwe meet the athletes and ask them the tough questions like what is their fave pizza topping?!

All across RTÉwe are Ready for the Moment with our own top team! Fans can watch 14 hours a day of coverage across three daily TV programmes on RTÉ2 and RTÉ Player.

RTÉ.ie have a cool website with all the latest news fromParis 2024. Meet ALL the Team Ireland starshere!

And we are all over socials too on X, Insta and TikTok with RTÉ Sport, RTÉ News and more!

RTÉ Radio 1 will have live coverage of the major action and updates across the regular shows as well as 2fm's Game On and much more.

For all the latest news check out Paris 2024 on RTÉ.ie.

Images Courtesy of Getty Images.
title: Olympic Games: We need everyone to cheer on Team Ireland
description: Follow Team Ireland at the Paris Olympic Games across RTÉ. And, have some fun with the athletes on RTÉjr socials!!
